title: Amazon Transit Gateway
description: Schema representing an Amazon Transit Gateway resource.

TransitGatewayId.description: The ID of the transit gateway.

TransitGatewayArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transit gateway.

State.description: The state of the transit gateway.

OwnerId.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the transit gateway.

Description.description: The description of the transit gateway.

AmazonSideAsn.description: A private Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the Amazon side of a BGP session.

AutoAcceptSharedAttachments.description: Indicates whether attachment requests are automatically accepted.

DefaultRouteTableAssociation.description: Indicates whether resource attachments are automatically associated with the default route table.

DefaultRouteTablePropagation.description: Indicates whether resource attachments automatically propagate routes to the default route table.

DnsSupport.description: Indicates whether DNS support is enabled.

VpnEcmpSupport.description: Indicates whether Equal Cost Multipath Protocol support is enabled.

AssociationDefaultRouteTableId.description: The ID of the default association route table.

PropagationDefaultRouteTableId.description: The ID of the default propagation route table.

CreationTime.description: The creation date and time of the transit gateway.

Tags.description: The tags assigned to the transit gateway.

Tag.description: A key-value pair for tagging resources.
